tasks.label: Build and Run with Input
tasks.command: echo [!time!] Build started & g++ -I"${workspaceFolder}\build" "${file}" -o "${workspaceFolder}\build\${fileBasenameNoExtension}.exe" 2> compile_error.txt && (del compile_error.txt 2>nul & echo [!time!] Running... & "${workspaceFolder}\build\${fileBasenameNoExtension}.exe" < input.txt > output.txt & echo [!time!] Done)
tasks.detail: Build to workspace/build/, run with input.txt, output to output.txt
